summary: Backend-only testing for Coach Rebalance + Contextual Ask Coach Flow. Tested GET /api/coach/active-trigger (6 trigger checks) and POST /api/coach/chat with new source field. All 13 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: coach_triggers.py: check_pr_streak — when hist_doc is None, old_best defaults to 0 correctly. No crash for users with no prior log entries.
get_active_trigger wraps each trigger call in try/except — no single trigger failure can crash the endpoint. Good defensive pattern.
source field on CoachRequest has default='user_typed' and is stored in message doc at line 2273. Both 'user_typed' and 'system_seed' accepted without 422.

pain_flag_recent trigger uses db.pain_reports.find() with date >= 3 days ago — correctly fires when pain report exists (verified: pain_flag_recent returned as triggerName after seeding a pain report).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 pain_report for user_a during test (TEST_ notes prefix). Not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GET /api/coach/active-trigger fully functional. Returns {triggerName: null} when no triggers active, returns full trigger object with triggerName/cardText/cta/seedPrompt/payload when active. pain_flag_recent fires correctly after pain report. source field on POST /api/coach/chat stored correctly. pr_streak does not crash for users with no recent PRs. User A (program mode) — active trigger at time of testing was pain_flag_recent due to seeded pain report.
